lastReleaseMessage: fix mobile scroll + flicker regression from v0.16.1: drop html/body max-width:100vw and overflow-x:hidden on <html> (100vw counts the scrollbar gutter and the html overflow forced overflow-y:auto, oscillating the vertical scrollbar on/off); repaint the preview only on viewport WIDTH change so the mobile URL-bar show/hide stops thrashing the render mid-scroll

barRaise.topFinding: Steady state with one fresh structural item. The queue-reconciliation action that topped yesterday's list landed: today's drift-auto-fix closed 11 stale yaa-spec items the v0.16.3 spec rewrite already satisfied, dropping pending yaa/apo work from 17 to 9, all genuine. The same cycle surfaced a new canonical-doc drift: PROJECT_SPEC 4.4 still documents an SVG-function symbol registry that locked decision v0.8.2 replaced with PNG-only symbols, and section 2 still calls the look all-SVG against a label that ships PNG symbols, PNG illustrations, and JPG textures. The label engine itself stays healthy: no renderer, state-model, or palette finding above LOW. Seven MEDIUM findings remain, all in the docs, dashboard, and repo-hygiene perimeter. Verdict holds at needs-attention.
